use_cases: Displaying adventure travel destinations with stacked scenic imagery
Showcasing product features with animated visual interest
Presenting blog posts or articles with hero imagery
Featuring real estate listings with gallery previews
Highlighting service offerings with dynamic card interactions
ai_summary: An animated card component featuring stacked images with CSS variable-based hover transformations, smooth lift and shadow effects on interaction, and a clean minimalist design using CSS custom properties for complex hover animations. The card includes a header with title and animated arrow, stacked image container, statistics section, and descriptive content area. Ideal for displaying destination features, product showcases, or content previews with engaging micro-interactions.
